summary: Testing completed for UI fixes - Glassmorphic Dashboard refactoring. All 5 reported bugs have been verified as FIXED. Backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and Frontend UI tests all successful.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 UI bugs from glassmorphic refactoring have been verified as fixed. The app is working correctly.

bug_1_sidebar_scrollbar.details: Sidebar has overflow-y: auto, all 38 navigation items accessible including Settings at bottom

bug_2_login_page_dark_design.details: Login page has dark glassmorphic design - bg-[#02040A] (rgb(2,4,10)), white text, gradient button (indigo to purple)

bug_3_dashboard_contrast.details: No black text on dark background found. All text uses white/white-opacity colors

bug_4_topbar_functional.details: Search bar visible and functional, Notifications dropdown working with real data (leads, overdue tasks), Profile dropdown working with settings/logout options

bug_5_ai_context_aware.details: Context-Aware badge visible, /api/ai-enhanced/context returns CRM data (factures, contacts, tâches, pipeline, devis), AI responds with real application data

auth.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns token and user info

login_page.login_flow: PASS - Successfully logs in and redirects

dashboard_overview.kpi_cards: PASS - All cards visible with correct styling
dashboard_overview.text_contrast: PASS - No black text on dark background
dashboard_overview.charts: PASS - Leads chart and Pipeline pie chart visible

ai_assistant.context_info_message: PASS - Shows CRM data access info
ai_assistant.ai_response: PASS - Responds with real task data
